# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    N = int(sys.stdin.readline())
    grid = [list(sys.stdin.readline().strip()) for _ in range(N)]

    # Extract the outer layer in clockwise order
    outer = []
    # Top row (left to right)
    for j in range(N):
        outer.append(grid[0][j])
    # Right column (top to bottom, excluding top)
    for i in range(1, N):
        outer.append(grid[i][N-1])
    # Bottom row (right to left, excluding last element)
    for j in range(N-2, -1, -1):
        outer.append(grid[N-1][j])
    # Left column (bottom to top, excluding bottom)
    for i in range(N-2, 0, -1):
        outer.append(grid[i][0])

    # Rotate the outer layer clockwise by one
    outer = [outer[-1]] + outer[:-1]

    # Reinsert the rotated outer layer back into the grid
    idx = 0
    # Top row (left to right)
    for j in range(N):
        grid[0][j] = outer[idx]
        idx += 1
    # Right column (top to bottom, excluding top)
    for i in range(1, N):
        grid[i][N-1] = outer[idx]
        idx += 1
    # Bottom row (right to left, excluding last element)
    for j in range(N-2, -1, -1):
        grid[N-1][j] = outer[idx]
        idx += 1
    # Left column (bottom to top, excluding bottom)
    for i in range(N-2, 0, -1):
        grid[i][0] = outer[idx]
        idx += 1

    # Print the resulting grid
    for row in grid:
        print(''.join(row))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
